fields.name: Sell-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related document.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line number.
The program filled in this field automatically and uses it to keep track of the various shipment lines.
You cannot change the line number because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line type.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location in which the invoice line was registered.

fields.name: Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the posting group that was used when the sales line was posted.
The program copies the code from the Posting Group field on the sales line.
You cannot change the code because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when items on the document are shipped or were shipped. A shipment date is usually calculated from a requested delivery date plus lead time.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies either the name of or the description of the item, general ledger account or item charge.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies information in addition to the description.

fields.name: Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the item or resource's unit of measure, such as piece or hour.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units of the item, general ledger account, or item charge on the line.

fields.name: Unit Price
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the unit price of the item in this line.
The program copies the unit price from the Unit Price field on the sales line.
You cannot change the unit price because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Unit Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost, in LCY, of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: VAT %
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the VAT percentage that is used on the shipment line.
The program copies the VAT percentage from the VAT % field on the sales line.
You cannot change the VAT percentage because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Line Discount %
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line discount percentage that was given on the line.
The program copies the line discount percentage from the Line Discount % field on the sales line.
You cannot change the line discount percentage because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Allow Invoice Disc.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the invoice line could have been included in a possible invoice discount calculation.
The program copies the information from the Allow Invoice Disc. field on the sales line.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Gross Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the gross weight of one unit of the item. In the sales statistics window, the gross weight on the line is included in the total gross weight of all the lines for the particular sales document.

fields.name: Net Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net weight of one unit of the item. In the sales statistics window, the net weight on the line is included in the total net weight of all the lines for the particular sales document.

fields.name: Units per Parcel
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units per parcel of the item. In the sales statistics window, the number of units per parcel on the line helps to determine the total number of units for all the lines for the particular sales document.

fields.name: Unit Volume
fields.tooltip: Specifies the volume of one unit of the item. In the sales statistics window, the volume of one unit of the item on the line is included in the total volume of all the lines for the particular sales document.

fields.name: Appl.-to Item Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry that the document or journal line is applied to.

fields.name: Item Shpt. Entry No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the item entry associated with the line.
The program created the number when the line was posted. The number is not displayed anywhere else in the program.
You cannot change the number because the shipment has already been posted.
Item Tracking
If the sales shipment line carries multiple unique item tracking numbers when posted, this will result in one item ledger entry for each item tracking number. For such one-to-many relations, the Item Entry Relation table manages the relation to the item ledger entries in stead of the Item Shpt. Entry No. field.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Customer Price Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the customer price group code used on the shipment.
The program copies the customer price group from the Customer Price Group field on the sales line.
You cannot change the customer price group because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Job No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project.

fields.name: Work Type Code
fields.tooltip: Belongs to the Job application area.

fields.name: Qty. Shipped Not Invoiced
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the shipped item that has been posted as shipped but that has not yet been posted as invoiced.

fields.name: Quantity Invoiced
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item on the line have been posted as invoiced.

fields.name: Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the sales order that this shipment was posted from.

fields.name: Order Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line number of this line on the sales order on which it was created.
You cannot change the order line number because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Bill-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer that you send or sent the invoice or credit memo to.

fields.name: Purchase Order No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a purchase order number to link a purchase order and a sales order.
It is only used with drop shipments from a vendor to a customer.
The program copies the number from the Purchase Order No. field on the sales line.
You cannot change the number because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Purch. Order Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a purchase order line number to link a purchase order and a sales order.
It is only used with drop shipments from a vendor to a customer.
The program copies the number from the Purch. Order Line No. field on the sales line.
You cannot change the number because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Drop Shipment
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the items on the line have been shipped directly from your vendor to the customer. If so, there is a check mark in the field.
The field is copies from the Drop Shipment field on the sales line.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the general business posting group code that is assigned to the customer that you sent the invoice for the shipment to.
The program copies the code from the Gen. Bus. Posting Group field on the sales header.
You cannot change the code because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the general product posting group code that is assigned to the items on this line.
The program automatically retrieves the code from the Item table or the Chart of Accounts table.
You cannot change the code because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Calculation Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies which VAT calculation type was used when this line was posted.
The program copies the code from the VAT Calculation Type field on the sales line.
You cannot change the code because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Transaction Type
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transaction type of the sales line that this line was posted from.
The program copies the transaction type from the Transaction Type field on the sales line.
You cannot change the transaction type because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Transport Method
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transport method of the sales line that this line was posted from.
The program copies the transport method from the Transport Method field on the sales line.
You cannot change the transport method because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Attached to Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the extended text line number that is attached to the sales line.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Exit Point
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code of the port of exit through which you shipped the items out of your country/region.
The program copies the code from the Exit Point field on the sales line.
You cannot change the code because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Area
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the area code used for the items in this line.
The program copies the code from the Area field on the sales line.
You cannot change the code because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Transaction Specification
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transaction specification of the sales line that this line was posted from.
The program copies the transaction specification from the Transaction Specification field on the sales line.
You cannot change the transaction specification because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Tax Area Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the tax area code of the customer.
The program copies the code from the Tax Area Code field on the sales line.

fields.name: Tax Liable
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that sales to the customer on the sales header were liable to sales tax.
The program copies the code from the Tax Liable field on the sales line.

fields.name: Tax Group Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the tax group code of the item.
The program copies the code from the Tax Group Code field on the sales line.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the VAT business posting group of the customer.
The program copies the code from the VAT Bus. Posting Group field on the sales line.

fields.name: VAT Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the VAT product posting group of the item.
The program copies the code from the VAT Prod. Posting Group field on the sales line.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency that is used on the entry.

fields.name: Blanket Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the blanket order that the record originates from.

fields.name: Blanket Order Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the blanket order line that the record originates from.

fields.name: VAT Base Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total net amount (amount excluding VAT) that the shipment line consists of. The program copied the amount from the VAT Base Amount field on the sales line.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit cost of the item on the shipment line. The unit cost is in the currency of the sales transaction.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date the sales document was posted.
The program copies the date from the Posting Date field on the sales header.
You cannot change the posting date because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.


Additional Information


You cannot change the contents of this field. Click the drop-down arrow to see the combination of posted dimension values.


The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.

fields.name: Authorized for Credit Card
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the sales shipment that is related to the posted sales order has had its payable amount authorized against the credit card account.

fields.name: Job Task No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project task.

fields.name: Job Contract Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry number of the job planning line that the sales shipment is linked to.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin where the items are picked or put away.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the quantity per item unit of measure for the items sold.
The program copies the number from the Qty. per Unit of Measure field on the sales line.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Quantity (Base)
fields.tooltip:
This field is automatically updated. The field shows the Quantity field on the line expressed in base units of measure.
You cannot change the quantity because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Qty. Invoiced (Base)
fields.tooltip:
This field is automatically updated. The field shows the Quantity Invoiced field on the line expressed in base units of measure.
You cannot change the quantity because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: FA Posting Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the FA posting date of the sales shipment line.
The program copies the date from the FA Posting Date field on the sales line.
You cannot change the date because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Depreciation Book Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the depreciation book code on the sales shipment line.
The program copies the code from the Depreciation Book Code field on the sales line.
You cannot change the code because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Depr. until FA Posting Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether or not depreciation was calculated until the FA posting date of the sales shipment line. If the field contains a Yes or a check mark, depreciation was posted for the asset for the period from the FA posting date of the previous FA ledger entry to the FA posting date of this sales shipment line.
The program copies the field from the Depr. until FA Posting Date field on the sales line.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Duplicate in Depreciation Book
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a depreciation book code if the sales line was posted to a depreciation book in addition to the one in the Depreciation Book Code field.
The program copies the code from the Duplicate in Depreciation Book field on the sales line.
You cannot change the code because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Use Duplication List
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the sales line was posted to all depreciation books that have a check mark in the Part of Duplication List field in the Depreciation Book table.
The program copies the contents of the field from the Use Duplication List field on the sales line.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Responsibility Center
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the responsibility center that serves the customer on this sales document.

fields.name: Item Category Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the item category code for the item.
You can use item categories to group default item setup values to make creating new items easier. An item category code specifies the following values:

Default general product posting group.


Default inventory posting group.


Default VAT product posting group.


Default costing method.


To see or select item categories in the Item Category window, click the drop-down arrow in the field.

fields.name: Nonstock
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the item on the sales line is a catalog item, which means it is not normally kept in inventory.

fields.name: Purchasing Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the purchasing code for the item.
A purchasing code indicates the actions that were taken to purchase the item on the sales line.
The system copies the purchasing code from the Purchasing Code field on the sales line.
You cannot make changes to the contents of the Purchasing Code field because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Item Reference No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the referenced item number.

fields.name: Requested Delivery Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that the customer has asked for the order to be delivered.

fields.name: Promised Delivery Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that you have promised to deliver the order, as a result of the Order Promising function.

fields.name: Shipping Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies how long it takes from when the items are shipped from the warehouse to when they are delivered.

fields.name: Outbound Whse. Handling Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies a date formula for the time it takes to get items ready to ship from this location. The time element is used in the calculation of the delivery date as follows: Shipment Date + Outbound Warehouse Handling Time = Planned Shipment Date + Shipping Time = Planned Delivery Date.

fields.name: Planned Delivery Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the planned date that the shipment will be delivered at the customer's address. If the customer requests a delivery date, the program calculates whether the items will be available for delivery on this date. If the items are available, the planned delivery date will be the same as the requested delivery date. If not, the program calculates the date that the items are available for delivery and enters this date in the Planned Delivery Date field.

fields.name: Planned Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that the shipment should ship from the warehouse. If the customer requests a delivery date, the program calculates the planned shipment date by subtracting the shipping time from the requested delivery date. If the customer does not request a delivery date or the requested delivery date cannot be met, the program calculates the content of this field by adding the shipment time to the shipping date.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number that the customer uses in their own system to refer to this sales document.

fields.name: Your Reference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's reference. The content will be printed on sales documents.

fields.name: Appl.-from Item Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry that the document or journal line is applied from.

fields.name: Item Charge Base Amount
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally. Suggests item charge assignment by amount.

fields.name: Correction
fields.tooltip: Specifies that this sales shipment line has been posted as a corrective entry.

fields.name: Return Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code explaining why the item was returned.

fields.name: Allow Line Disc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a line discount has been calculated for the price offered.

fields.name: Customer Disc. Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer discount group code. This code is copied from the sales line.
